title: thelypteris clypeolutata var. holmei
intro: Thelypteris clypeolutata var. holmei, also known as Holme's shield fern, is a variety of the Thelypteris clypeolutata species, a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Holme's shield fern is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Holme's shield fern can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is often used in traditional remedies in various parts of the world.
